task:
Bootstrap a new RenderDoc project workspace from scratch.

Starting state:
  /home/user/staging/project_frame1.rdc  (valid capture)
  /home/user/staging/project_frame2.rdc  (valid capture)
  /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config  (default config)

Do all of the following:
1. Create the directory /home/user/rdoc_workspace (and any missing parents).
2. Create subdirectories /home/user/rdoc_workspace/captures and /home/user/rdoc_workspace/settings.
3. MOVE project_frame1.rdc and project_frame2.rdc from /home/user/staging into /home/user/rdoc_workspace/captures, keeping filenames.
4. Edit /home/user/.local/share/qrenderdoc/UI.config so that:
     - "UIStyle" is the exact string "Dark".
     - "Font_GlobalScale" is the number 1.3.
     - "TextureViewer_ResetRange" is true.
     - "DefaultCaptureSaveDirectory" is the exact string "/home/user/rdoc_workspace/captures".
     - "RecentCaptureFiles" contains both moved captures:
         /home/user/rdoc_workspace/captures/project_frame1.rdc
         /home/user/rdoc_workspace/captures/project_frame2.rdc
     - The "rdocConfigData": 1 marker must remain present.

When finished, /home/user/staging must contain zero .rdc files, /home/user/rdoc_workspace/captures must contain exactly 2 valid .rdc files, and /home/user/rdoc_workspace/settings must exist as an empty directory.
